data.title: Bitcoin bulls tricked bears again at $78K
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) is back from the dead. After plunging below $77K this week, BTC bounced back to retain the $84K mark.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitcoin-bulls-tricked-bears-again-at-78k/

data.title: MoonPay receives Wisconsin money transmitter license
data.description: Cryptocurrency payment platform MoonPay has received a money transmission license (MTL) from the Wisconsin Department of Financial Institutions, allowing it to expand its operations in the state. Wisconsin residents can now use MoonPay’s services, including recharging their MoonPay Balance at no additional cost.

data.title: The total profit of the first address on the mubarak list has grown to $568,000, with a return rate of 493 times
data.description: On-chain analyst @ai_9684xtpa monitored that due to the positive impact of the Binance Alpha listing, the market value of mubarak briefly exceeded 50 million US dollars, and the total profit of the number one address 0x970...0a710 has increased to 568,000 US dollars, with a return rate of 493 times. Two days ago, the address spent 1,153 US dollars to buy 20.84 million tokens at a low price of 0.00005533 US dollars. At present, 62% of the holdings have been sold, and the remaining 13 million tokens still have a floating profit of 566,000 US dollars. This address does not seem to be an insider address, because he has bought almost all memes named mubarak.

data.title: Mubarak's market value briefly exceeded 50 million US dollars, temporarily reported at 41.5 million US dollars
data.description: GMGN market data shows that due to the launch of Binance Alpha, the market value of mubarak briefly exceeded US$50 million and was temporarily reported at US$41.5 million.

data.title: Binance Alpha Adds mubarak
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance Alpha has added mubarak.

data.title: Binance Alpha now supports mubarak
data.description: Binance's official page shows that mubarak is now available on Binance Alpha.

data.title: JD Vance says a high-level TikTok deal is expected by April
data.description:
Vice President JD Vance hopes a ‘high-level’ deal will be reached by the April 5th deadline to keep TikTok up and running in the United States.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/jd-vance-says-tiktok-deal-expected-april/
